required_human_actions: Create repository_policy_decision.json after human repository/anonymization review.
Create deadline_verification.json after manually verifying the CFP/EasyChair deadline.
Create author_final_approval.json only after human approval of every final gate.

warnings.message: LaTeX log contains overfull boxes or layout-check markers.
warnings.remediation_hint: Human authors must inspect the compiled PDF layout and resolve overfull boxes or table fit issues.
